title: Design and validation of a PCR screen for γ-butyrolactone-like regulatory systems in Streptomyces
author: Valentin Waschulin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This archive contains data related to the article "Design and validation of a PCR screen for γ-butyrolactone-like regulatory systems in Streptomyces" in Access Microbiology.  

 
	  downloaded_genomes.txt:  The list of the 2040  Streptomyces  genomes downloaded by ncbi-genome-download and used in this analysis 
	  analysis_data_and_script.zip:  
 

 
	 cblaster output data
	 
		 search_ScbA_ScbR_600.txt - cblaster output file 
		 extracted_clusters_cblaster - gbk files of all clusters obtained using cblaster extract 
		 all_sequences.fasta - amino acid sequences of all proteins in the extracted clusters 
	 
	 
	 R markdown "Analysis script.rmd", which also contains some instructions for some bash operations using seqkit and grep 
	 intermediary files generated:
	 
		 ScbA_divergent_genes.txt - IDs of ScbA genes in divergent pair 
		 ScbR_divergent_genes.txt - IDs of ScbR genes in divergent pair 
		 ScbA_divergent.fasta - sequences of ScbA genes in divergent pair 
		 ScbR_divergent.fasta - sequences of ScbR genes in divergent pair 
		 ETxRx_containing_ScbA_list.txt - list of IDs of  ScbA homologs containing ETxRx motif in divergent pair 
		 YFHx_containing_ScbR_list.txt - list of IDs of ScbR homologs containing YFHx motif in divergent pair 
		 ETxRx_containing_gbk_list.txt - list of extracted cluster genbank files containing ScbA homolog with ETxRx motif in divergent pair 
		 ETxRx_and_YFHx_containing_gbk_list.txt - list of extracted cluster genbank files containing ScbA homolog with ETxRx motif and ScbR homolog with YFHx motif in divergent pair, i.e. co-occurrence of motifs 
	 
	 
 

 
	  Sanger sequences  (ending in .seq) of the PCR reactions 
	 The  genomes  of three newly sequenced Antarctic Streptomyces (illumina and nanopore hybrid assembly using unicycler).
